no: LOCAL FIX APPLIED: Commented out ~bg2ee~ from games_incompatible array in laf/errors/!_CheckIEgames.tpa to allow EET installation. Automated fix: eet-mod-forge-patches component #10.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: This is an item mod that contains 2 enchanted katanas and 1 armor for a Wizard Slayer.

co.no: LOCAL FIX APPLIED: laf/errors/!_CheckIEgames.tpa listed ~bg2ee~ as incompatible (line 14) while ~eet~ was commented out (line 9). EET runs on BG2EE executable so GAME_IS bg2ee evaluates true, triggering false incompatibility error. Patched: commented out ~bg2ee~ in games_incompatible array. Automated fix: eet-mod-forge-patches component #10.
